# Howl We Roll — Mobile Pet Grooming

> Howl We Roll is a professional mobile dog grooming service based in Canonsburg, PA, serving Cecil Township, McMurray, Peters Township, Bridgeville, Upper St. Clair, Washington, Southpointe, and the greater Pittsburgh south suburbs.

## About
- Owner: Christine Dunn, Certified Pet Groomer
- Type: Mobile pet grooming (van comes to your home)
- Phone: 724-898-1988
- Email: christine@howlweroll.com
- Address: 33 Vertical Dr, Canonsburg, PA 15317
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/howlweroll
- Website: https://howlweroll.com

## Services & Pricing
- Bath & Brush: Starting at $55 (warm bath, blow dry, brush out, ear cleaning, nail trim, bandana)
- Full Groom: Starting at $75 (everything in Bath & Brush plus haircut, styling, sanitary trim, paw pad trim)
- Puppy's First Groom: $45 (gentle intro for puppies under 6 months)
- Nail Trim & Pawdicure: $20
- Add-Ons: teeth brushing ($10), flea & tick treatment ($15), de-shedding ($20), blueberry facial ($10), nail grinding ($5)
- Prices vary by dog size: Small (<25 lbs), Medium (25-50 lbs +$10-15), Large (50-80 lbs +$20-30), XL (80+ lbs +$30-45)

## Service Areas
Canonsburg PA, Cecil Township PA, McMurray PA, Peters Township PA, Bridgeville PA, Upper St. Clair PA, Washington PA, Southpointe PA, Houston PA, Chartiers Township PA

## Key Pages
- Home: https://howlweroll.com/
- Services & Pricing: https://howlweroll.com/services
- About Christine: https://howlweroll.com/about
- Photo Gallery: https://howlweroll.com/our-pups
- Van Tour: https://howlweroll.com/van-tour
- Reviews: https://howlweroll.com/reviews
- Book Appointment: https://howlweroll.com/book

## Hours
- Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM - 3:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Unique Value
- One-on-one grooming in a fully equipped mobile van
- No cages, no other animals, no stress
- Van is self-contained (no need for client's water or electricity)
- Climate controlled, sanitized between every appointment
- Specialized in anxious and senior dogs
- Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
